description: Implement permadeath with the run cycle and airlock stash meta-progression. When the player dies, the run ends. Items stashed in the ship's airlock persist between runs. A new run starts with stashed gear available.
acceptance_criteria: Given the player's HP reaches 0, when the death is processed, then a 'run over' screen displays run statistics (turns survived, enemies killed, items found).
From the run-over screen, the player can start a new run.
The player can access their docked ship at any time by returning to the Docking Ring sector entrance.
Given the player is in the ship, when they interact with the airlock stash, then they can move items from their inventory into the stash (max 6 stash slots).
Items in the airlock stash persist across runs and are available at the start of the next run.
On starting a new run, the player begins in the docked ship with access to stashed items before entering the station.
All equipped and non-stashed items are lost on death.
notes: Spec: 'Physical items stashed in your ship's airlock persist between runs. Limited space forces meaningful choices. This is the core meta-loop.' Use localStorage or IndexedDB for persistence across browser sessions.
